allow: PowerShell(Get-Command flutter -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "C:\\flutter\\bin\\flutter.bat" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\flutter\\bin\\flutter.bat" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; where.exe flutter 2>$null)

PowerShell(git config --get core.sshCommand; $gitSsh = \(Get-Command ssh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; Write-Output "SSH: $gitSsh"; $gitHome = \(git --exec-path | Split-Path -Parent | Split-Path -Parent\); Write-Output "Git home: $gitHome")

PowerShell($env:GIT_SSH_COMMAND = "ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new"; git add .github/workflows/build.yml; git commit -m "ci: add GitHub Actions pipeline to build and release APK on push to main"; git push 2>&1)
